title: Mustardy Dutch Meyeolchi Pilaf
description: A crispy, mustardy meal-prep pilaf dish featuring myeolchi-anchovies and long-fermentation-dough. Perfect for a quick and easy lunch or dinner.
instructions: Cut the long-fermentation-dough into small pieces.
In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the brown mustard seeds and cook for 1 minute.
Add the myeolchi-anchovies and cook until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the kosher salt and stir to combine.
Transfer the dough pieces to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the dough in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Flake the crispy dough into small pieces and mix with the myeolchi-anchovies and parsley.
